description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust, angular frame and a matte black finish. The upper receiver is bulky and features a metallic, slightly translucent cover, possibly for an advanced loading or ejection mechanism. The grip is ergonomic, with visible texturing and a squared-off trigger guard for enhanced control. There are several small red and yellow indicator lights or buttons on the body, suggesting electronic or smart features. The muzzle is reinforced and appears to have a tactical attachment or integrated flashlight below the barrel. The overall design is modern and tactical, suitable for urban law enforcement or high-tech security scenarios.
description: A compact, futuristic black shotgun with a bulky upper receiver, ergonomic grip, and tactical attachments. It features indicator lights and a reinforced muzzle, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced muzzle, tactical attachment below the barrel, and a red indicator light above the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bulky upper receiver, metallic cover, ergonomic grip, and multiple indicator lights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared-off trigger guard, rear sight, and the back of the upper receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same bulky upper receiver and grip, with additional detail on the side panel and indicator lights.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with slight reinforcement and ergonomic shaping
